A //fabrik:cli:command whose dependency has no provider is reported at emit time.
-- go.mod --
module app

go 1.26

require github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/cli v0.1.0

replace github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/cli => CLIDIR
-- main.go --
package main

import "os"

func main() { os.Exit(run()) }
-- shared/shared.go --
package shared

import "github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/cli"

type Missing struct{}

//fabrik:cli:command
func GreetCommand(m *Missing) *cli.Command {
	return &cli.Command{Name: "greet"}
}
-- want/diags --
error: shared/shared.go:7:1: no provider for *shared.Missing
  help: add a //fabrik:provider returning *shared.Missing
